ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., Boolean, Float, Integer) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the hyperparameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter value */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowed value for the hyperparameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowed value for the hyperparameter */,
  "enum_values" TEXT /* List of allowed values for the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_hyperparameters" (
  "experiment_hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-hyperparameter combination */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter for the experiment */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the hyperparameter value is the default value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_hyperparameters_hyperparameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparameter_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the metric value */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the metric value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_users" (
  "experiment_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-user combination */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the experiment */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_users_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last edited */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "experiment_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "committed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who committed the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_committed_by FOREIGN KEY ("committed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "algorithm_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "tag_id")
)
